name: Corvus Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: Corvus Pharmaceuticals is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing product candidates that precisely target proteins critical to immune cell maturation and function. Its lead product candidate, soquelitinib, is an ITK inhibitor being studied for relapsed T cell lymphomas and atopic dermatitis. The company also develops ciforadenant (A2A receptor antagonist) for solid tumors and mupadolimab (anti-CD73 antibody) for cancer and infectious diseases.
sellsTo: patients with relapsed peripheral T cell lymphoma
patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis
patients with solid tumors (renal cell carcinoma and others)

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company developing product candidates that precisely target proteins that are critical to immune cell maturation and function.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 registrational trial for soquelitinib in relapsed PTCL
catalysts.sentence: We initiated this clinical trial in the third quarter of 2024.

catalysts.event: Interim data from Phase 1 atopic dermatitis cohort 4 announced
catalysts.sentence: On January 20, 2026, we announced positive results from cohort 4 of our randomized, blinded, placebo-controlled Phase 1 clinical trial evaluating soquelitinib in patients with moderate to severe atopic dermatitis.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 2 clinical trial for soquelitinib in atopic dermatitis
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we initiated a Phase 2 clinical trial of soquelitinib for the treatment of atopic dermatitis.

catalysts.event: Presentation of final Phase 1/1b data at ASH
catalysts.sentence: Final data from the Phase 1/1b clinical trial were presented at the American Society of Hematology Annual Meeting (ASH) in December 2025.
